results: Tim Heldt (born 1996) is a German YouTuber known for KuchenTV channel founded in 2014
Started with baking content, evolved to gaming, comedy, and political commentary
Has over 1.19 million subscribers, known for unscripted 'Kuchen Talks' series
Based in Eisenach, Germany; also runs iKuchen, KuchenTV Uncut channels
Controversial figure in German gaming community, known for direct communication style
